shellCommands.command: pwd && git status --short && grep -R "formState.*name\|name.*formState\|_subjects.state" -n src/logic src | head -80

grep -R "function shouldRenderFormState\|shouldRenderFormState" -n src | head && grep -n "interface FormState\|type FormState" src/types/form.ts src/types/*.ts | head -20 && grep -n "name.*clearErrors\|clearErrors.*handleSubmit\|handleSubmit" src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx | tail -30

grep -n "_setFormState\|let _formState\|const _formState" src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head -20 && sed -n '120,190p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '1310,1370p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts
head -45 src/logic/createFormControl.ts; head -25 src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts; cat package.json | grep -A8 scripts
